ksa_text: Knowledge of data asset management principles and practices, including data discovery, asset inventory and cataloging, ownership assignment, lifecycle tracking, and value assessment of data assets.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks and benefits from third-party entities are managed.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.
AI risks and benefits from third-party entities are managed.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Quality KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.425) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Governance. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.425 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Data Quality. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Data Quality is not sufficiently central to the VP Data Governance to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Governance roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Data Quality is not a standard competency expectation for VP Data Governance. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the VP Data Governance competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.425) and edge-domain placement (Data Quality) do not meet inclusion threshold for the VP Data Governance. All passes support exclusion.
